# sops Provider

SOPS decrypt provider with first-class credential configuration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `age` (Block, Optional) age key configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--age))
- `aws` (Block, Optional) AWS KMS credential configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--aws))
- `azure` (Block, Optional) Azure Key Vault credential configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--azure))
- `concurrency_limit` (Number) Maximum number of parallel decrypt calls (default 4).
- `gcp` (Block, Optional) GCP KMS credential configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--gcp))
- `pgp` (Block, Optional) PGP / GnuPG configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pgp))

<a id="nestedblock--age"></a>
### Nested Schema for `age`

Optional:

- `key` (String, Sensitive)
- `key_command` (String)
- `key_file` (String)
- `ssh_private_key_file` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--aws"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws`

Optional:

- `assume_role` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--aws--assume_role))
- `env` (Map of String)
- `profile` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `shared_config_files` (List of String)
- `shared_credentials_files` (List of String)

<a id="nestedblock--aws--assume_role"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws.assume_role`

Optional:

- `duration` (String)
- `external_id` (String)
- `role_arn` (String)
- `session_name` (String)



<a id="nestedblock--azure"></a>
### Nested Schema for `azure`

Optional:

- `client_id` (String)
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive)
- `tenant_id` (String)
- `use_cli` (Boolean)
- `use_msi` (Boolean)
- `use_oidc` (Boolean)
- `use_workload_identity` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedblock--gcp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `gcp`

Optional:

- `credentials` (String, Sensitive)
- `credentials_file` (String)
- `impersonate_service_account` (String)
- `quota_project` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--pgp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pgp`

Optional:

- `gnupg_home` (String)
